note: Text-only, lowest-latency/lowest-cost Nova tier; suited to simple tasks and high-throughput agent orchestration.

verificationNotes: Confirmed real: Dec 3, 2024 re:Invent launch corroborated by multiple press sources. Confirmed 128K text-only context (AWS Nova docs — Micro is text-to-text only, unlike Lite/Pro/Premier). 200-language support and $0.035/$0.14 per M pricing confirmed against AWS Nova pricing/docs. All 9 benchmark rows (MMLU 77.6, GPQA 40, MATH 69.3, HumanEval 81.1, GSM8K 92.3, BBH 79.5, IFEval 87.2, DROP 79.3, ARC-Challenge 90.2) confirmed to literally appear on deepranking.ai/llm-models/nova-micro. No changes made.
